content.text: A single cartoon tower defense cannon turret for a mobile game, three-quarter isometric view, chunky rounded silhouette, compact low-poly friendly design, teal metal barrel, warm yellow-orange armor panels, dark rubber base, small bolts and simple readable shapes, stylized hand-painted game asset concept, isolated on pure white background, soft even studio lighting, single object only, no text, no watermark, no characters, no environment, no shadows
